=== bd94-07-10.txt
===================
===================
===================
Still On The Road  Bob Dylan 1994: Europe Summer Tour
15160 Tanzbrunnen
Rheinpark
Kln, Germany
10 July 1994

received in a trade as fixing of sh rec.

DISK 1 ----- 66:17
1. Jokerman
2. The Man In Me
3. All Along The Watchtower
4. I Don't Believe You (She Acts Like We Never Have Met)
5. Tangled Up In Blue
6. I'll Be Your Baby Tonight
7. Love Minus Zero/No Limit
8. Masters Of War
9. Boots Of Spanish Leather
10. God Knows

DISK 2 ---- 31:12
1. I Believe In You
2. Maggie's Farm

3. Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35
4. It Ain't Me, Babe



Concert # 582 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 7 of the 1994 Europe Summer Tour. 1994 concert #
46.
Concert # 126 with the 9th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Bucky Baxter (pedal
steel guitar & electric slide guitar), John Jackson (guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), Winston Watson (drums &
percussion).
7-9, 14 acoustic with the band
6, 9, 14 Bob Dylan harmonica.
5 new songs (35%) compared to previous concert. 1 new song for this tour.
Stereo audience recording, 95 minutes.
Session info updated 15 December 1994.
